2604.18423.title: BhashaSutra: A Task-Centric Unified Survey of Indian NLP Datasets, Corpora, and Resources
2604.18423.paper_summary: India's linguistic landscape, spanning 22 scheduled languages and hundreds of marginalized dialects, has driven rapid growth in NLP datasets, benchmarks, and pretrained models. However, no dedicated survey consolidates resources developed specifically for Indian languages. Existing reviews either focus on a few high-resource languages or subsume Indian languages within broader multilingual settings, limiting coverage of low-resource and culturally diverse varieties. To address this gap, we present the first unified survey of Indian NLP resources, covering 200+ datasets, 50+ benchmarks, and 100+ models, tools, and systems across text, speech, multimodal, and culturally grounded tasks. We organize resources by linguistic phenomena, domains, and modalities; analyze trends in annotation, evaluation, and model design; and identify persistent challenges such as data sparsity, uneven language coverage, script diversity, and limited cultural and domain generalization. This survey offers a consolidated foundation for equitable, culturally grounded, and scalable NLP research in the Indian linguistic ecosystem.
2604.18423.paper_summary_zh: 印度的語言景觀涵蓋22種計劃語言和數百種邊緣方言，驅動了自然語言處理（NLP）數據集、基準和預訓練模型的快速增長。<lb/>然而，目前尚未有專門的調查整合專為印度語言開發的資源。<lb/>現有的回顧要麼集中在幾種高資源語言上，要麼將印度語言納入更廣泛的多語言環境中，限制了對低資源和文化多樣性變體的覆蓋。<lb/>為了解決這一空白，我們呈現了首個統一的印度NLP資源調查，涵蓋200多個數據集、50多個基準以及100多個模型、工具和系統，涉及文本、語音、多模態和文化根植的任務。<lb/>我們根據語言現象、領域和模態組織資源；分析標註、評估和模型設計的趨勢；並識別持續存在的挑戰，如數據稀疏性、不均衡的語言覆蓋、字母表多樣性以及有限的文化和領域泛化。<lb/>這項調查為印度語言生態系統中的公平、文化根植和可擴展的NLP研究提供了統一的基礎。
2604.18423.author: Raghvendra Kumar et.al.
2604.18423.authors: Raghvendra Kumar, Devankar Raj, Sriparna Saha
